contract_claim: `get_recommended_runtime` recommends `"npx"` whenever `nodejs.available` and `nodejs.npx_available` are both True (L156–158), ignoring `nodejs.package_accessible`. This means npx is recommended even when `@debugmcp/mcp-debugger` is not accessible, which would result in a failed launch.
